ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signal_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal the metrics are computed for */,
  "rms_t0" REAL /* RMS value at time t0 */,
  "rms_t1" REAL /* RMS value at time t1 */,
  "rms" REAL /* RMS value at the current time */,
  "rms_avg" REAL /* Average RMS value over a period */,
  "rms_max" REAL /* Maximum RMS value */,
  "rms_min" REAL /* Minimum RMS value */,
  "rms_stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of RMS values */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy value of the signal */,
  "entropy_t0" REAL /* Entropy value at time t0 */,
  "entropy_t1" REAL /* Entropy value at time t1 */,
  "entropy_max" REAL /* Maximum entropy value */,
  "entropy_min" REAL /* Minimum entropy value */,
  "entropy_stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of entropy values */,
  "signal_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the signal */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_metrics_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the signal */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the signal */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the signal */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the signal */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the signal */,
  "signal_description" TEXT /* Description of the signal */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the signal data */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("frequency") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES signal_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_value" REAL /* Value of the frequency */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the frequency */,
  "frequency_description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being accessed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal or metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal or metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES signal_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the signal */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_versions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal the annotation belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation */,
  "annotation_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_annotations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_tags_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_signals" (
  "project_signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-signal association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal */,
  "signal_role" TEXT /* Role of the signal in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_signals_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_signals_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-team association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team */,
  "team_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the report belongs to */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal analyzed in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_processing_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)
